title: Bridging Software Engineering with Strategic Problem Solving
description:
I am a Computer Science student and Researcher with a unique background as a U.S. Navy Veteran and Business Analyst. My focus is on developing secure, reliable software systems that solve real-world problems. 

I combine technical expertise in full-stack development with the analytical mindset of a QA professional to ensure that every product I build is not only functional but resilient and user-centric.

techStack.name: Web Development
techStack.proficiency: Building responsive, mobile-first interfaces and migrating legacy sites to modern full-stack architectures.

techStack.name: AI Engineering
techStack.proficiency: Integrating Python-based logic and fundamental programming concepts into automated workflows.

techStack.name: Cybersecurity
techStack.proficiency: Hands-on experience in logging, incident response, and anomaly detection using Splunk and Wireshark.

techStack.name: DevOps & Systems
techStack.proficiency: Ensuring reliable operation across environments using Docker and managing microservices integration testing.

techStack.name: Data Architecture
techStack.proficiency: Executing complex SQL queries and structuring MongoDB databases for seamless website deployments.

techStack.name: Quality Assurance
techStack.proficiency: Leading regression testing and analyzing metrics to optimize user engagement and system uptime.
